name: Domo API
what_it_does: Comprehensive REST API for Domo's cloud BI platform enabling programmatic management of datasets, dashboards, cards, users, and groups.
use_cases: Automated dataset ingestion and refresh from external systems
User provisioning and access control automation
Embedding Domo visualizations in external applications
Building data pipelines that push business metrics to Domo
not_for: Ad-hoc SQL query execution (use Snowflake or BigQuery instead)
Teams that don't already use Domo as their BI platform
best_when: Your organization already uses Domo and you need to automate data ingestion, user management, or embed dashboards in other applications
avoid_when: You need sub-second data freshness or are evaluating BI platforms from scratch

auth.notes: OAuth 2.0 client credentials flow; scopes cover data, dashboard, user, audit resources. Client ID and secret required.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free tier available for small teams with limited data rows and users
pricing.paid_tiers: Professional and Enterprise tiers; pricing not publicly listed, requires sales contact
pricing.notes: API access included with all paid plans. Free tier has significant row-count restrictions.

performance.rate_limits: Per-endpoint rate limits; dataset import limited by row count and frequency

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Standard HTTP error codes with JSON error bodies; dataset import errors surface after async job completion
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Dataset replace operations are idempotent; row-level upserts supported via stream API
known_agent_gotchas: Large dataset imports use async stream API requiring job polling
OAuth tokens expire; token refresh must be handled by caller
Rate limits not consistently documented per endpoint
Some dashboard/card APIs require Domo instance-specific IDs hard to discover programmatically

security_score_components.security_notes: OAuth 2.0 with scoped access; SOC2 Type II certified; HIPAA BAA available on enterprise
